en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 61

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 61
Top Question of the Week
Where is the money coming from?
A great question that doesn’t just apply to DeFi.

Whether we are looking at the NFT market, web3 as a whole, or, the broader global economy, there’s a lot of confusion and sleight of hand about where money flows from and how it is generated. This can become even more confusing for some who have gotten conditioned to believe content and culture are where value gets locked down or goes to die, rather than understanding the critical role creative communication of ideas, know-how and all forms of information plays in facilitating distribution for what is produced.

In turbulent times like these, it becomes even more critical for re-establishments of previously violated creative rights, like CC0, to be well understood as mediums or mechanisms for maximising distribution reach and success.

The money in well engineered, good faith projects, products and services comes from gains in coordination efficiency, energy efficiency, engineering quality, streamlined logistics, more flexible and composable forms of ownership and in all ways better matching up the desires and needs of producers and consumers.
Most Common Repeat Question
What’s happening this week?

We’re kicking off #cc0summer in a big way with a handful of can’t miss events. From the advanced screening of The Sticky by the F₃M designer realm, to an action packed cc0 summer panel to IRL dimensional production workshops in NYC.
You can check out the full schedule here as we ramp up towards Web3 Fashion Week and NFT.NYC.
Top Controversies
Maybe some of us were still hopeful that there would be some humility or presence of mind on the part of a project leader that from most points of view looks a lot like a huckster in chief, but no.
Despite the massive loss of wealth and livelihoods for those that probably should have thought twice before believing in him, he’s rolling out Luna 2.0 with shocking confidence.
I get the desire to get back up and start rebuilding after a bad fall. But this clearly isn’t that.
Silly Fails and Trolling
So true. Next they’re gunna claim that it’s all a meta-ironic self troll whilst they laugh all the way to the McVision Fund Solunavax VC chain bank in the otherside.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
